# Pull Request

Provide a brief description of the changes in this PR.

## Related Issue
Fixes #(issue number)
Relates to #(issue number)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Test improvement

## Testing
Describe how you tested your changes:

### Test Coverage
- [ ] Added unit tests for new functionality
- [ ] Added integration tests if applicable
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`mvn test`)
- [ ] Tested with simulator scenarios
- [ ] Manual testing performed

Paste test results here

## Performance Impact
Describe any performance impact (positive or negative):
- Memory usage: [No change/Increased by X/Decreased by X]
- CPU usage: [No change/Increased by X/Decreased by X]
- Throughput: [No change/Increased by X/Decreased by X]

## Documentation
- [ ] Updated README.md if applicable
- [ ] Updated HLD if architecture changed
- [ ] Updated CHANGELOG.md
- [ ] Added/updated JavaDoc comments
- [ ] Updated CLAUDE.md if development process changed

## Backward Compatibility
- [ ] This change is backward compatible
- [ ] This change requires a major version bump (breaking change)
- [ ] This change requires migration guide (explain below)

### Migration Guide (if applicable)
Explain how users should migrate from the old behavior to the new:

```java
// Old way
// ...

// New way
// ...
```

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's code style
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published

## Screenshots (if applicable)
Add screenshots to help explain your changes (especially for simulator UI changes).

Add any other context about the pull request here.
